SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2022 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF APR-05-2022 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. ALL PARTIES AND WITNESS ARE SWORN. RESPONDENT FRANK CUTLER IS PRESENT. KATHRYN ANDREW TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF RESPONDENT. APPELLANT MICHAEL J. POLENSKE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
